title: API client — generic HTTP layer with CF header injection
description: Implement APIClient.swift as a struct holding a CredentialsStore reference. Generic func get<T: Decodable>(_ path: String) async throws -> T builds a URLRequest from store.baseURL + path, injects CF-Access-Client-Id and CF-Access-Client-Secret headers from the store, calls URLSession.shared.data(for:), and decodes with JSONDecoder. func post(_ path: String) async throws does the same with HTTP POST and ignores the response body. Throws URLError on network failure; DecodingError on bad JSON. Add concrete methods: getSources() async throws -> [Source] (GET /sources) and healthCheck() async throws -> HealthResponse (GET /health).
acceptance_criteria: APIClient is a struct with a single CredentialsStore property
Every request injects CF-Access-Client-Id and CF-Access-Client-Secret headers from the store
get<T> decodes the response body with JSONDecoder
post sets HTTP method to POST and does not attempt to decode the response body
healthCheck() issues GET /health and returns HealthResponse
URLError is thrown on network failure; DecodingError is thrown on malformed JSON
